subcodes.title: Words to a visitor, spoken on 1913-05-12
subcodes.first_line: His Holiness Christ said: I am the bread which has come down from heaven. Again he said: Whosoever eats of this bread, he shall find a new life. The heavenly food is the divine virtues of the world of humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: خود مسیح میفرماید منم نان حیات پس آن مائدهٴ کمالات و یوضات آسمانی بود و آن طبقها
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @The Holy Spirit, @symbolism
